# Insulin Glulisine 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Insulin Glulisine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Insulin Glulisine</strong> 目前有 <strong>2 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Insulin Glulisine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of adults, adolescents and children, six years or older with diabetes mellitus, where treatment with insulin is required.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（99.5%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.5%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.5%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（99.4%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（99.2%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（99.2%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（99.1%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（99.1%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetic ketoacidosis（97.5%）</li>
<li>permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus（96.9%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus, insulin-dependent, X-linked, susceptibility to（92.7%）</li>
<li>IDDM 1（91.0%）</li>
<li>pancreatitis（82.0%）</li>
<li>glaucoma（70.8%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（69.8%）</li>
<li>acute kidney failure（69.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/insulin-glulisine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
